experiments.purpose: Does a ~Escapable-admitting Collection.Protocol Index associatedtype preserve the storable-index contract (formIndex)? Tests the lifetime-annotation design space (@_lifetime(copy i) vs borrow self) and the ~Copyable-index subscript wall.
experiments.statusDetail: @_lifetime(copy i) CONFIRMED (formIndex typechecks; consumer compiles cross-module debug+release and runs); @_lifetime(borrow self) REFUTED ('i' escapes, depends on self); ~Copyable index REFUTED (subscripts cannot have noncopyable parameters yet). Overturns the prior /tmp-spike conclusion that ~Escapable was not viable for a Collection index.
